programme.desc: As Erinsborough prepares for the Mardi Gras parade, David and Aaron are living it up in Sydney, and Paul helps Lucy and Mark Gottlieb to reconnect(n)

programme.title: A Deadly Affair (2017)
programme.desc: Suspecting her husband Charlie of having an affair, author Mary trails him to the house he has been renovating, only to find his dead body. As she is having her own fling, Mary becomes the lead suspect in her spouse's murder. Thriller, starring Valerie Azlynn, Austin Highsmith and Luke Edwards(n)

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: A harassed Rachel tells Ross she thinks they should take a break from each other - so he responds by getting drunk and sleeping with a woman Joey and Chandler have been chasing. Comedy, starring Jennifer Aniston and David Schwimmer(n)

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross tries to prevent Rachel discovering he slept with Chloe from the photocopying shop, but she finds out anyway and a major argument ensues at her apartment. Trapped in Monica's bedroom, the other friends cannot help overhearing everything(n)

programme.title: 5 News at 5
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world(n)

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: As Erinsborough prepares for the Mardi Gras parade, David and Aaron are living it up in Sydney, and Paul helps Lucy and Mark Gottlieb to reconnect(n)

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Robbo realises what Bella is up to but worries about convincing Colby, Jade is arrested after Ryder reports the theft, and Robbo gets a grim reminder that his troubles are not over(n)

programme.title: 5 News Tonight
programme.desc: A round-up of the evening's headlines, including coverage of the latest national and international stories(n)

programme.title: Britain's Greatest Bridges
programme.desc: Engineer Rob Bell offers an insight into the history, design and building process of the Britannia Bridge, across the Menai Strait between the island of Anglesey and the mainland of Wales. The difficult task of building the 100ft iron structure was taken up by civil engineer Robert Stephenson and his team, including William Fairbairn and Eaton Hodgkinson. But in May 1970, four youths set light to the famous bridge, and Rob meets a fireman who fought the blaze that fateful night(n)

programme.title: The Yorkshire Steam Railway: All Aboard
programme.desc: Paul Middleton, aka Piglet, and the team attempt to finish the restoration of a 9F locomotive that has taken more than 50 years, and also bring the monster King Edward IV engine to the branch line for its gala. It cost a small fortune to transport there, and Piglet doesn't know if the huge engine will fit on the small branch line. Plus, the programme meets Beth, the railway's first female loco driver, and follows Gill and Sammie on the Pullman dining train for their last afternoon tea service of the season(n)

programme.title: Celebrity Britain by Barge: Then & Now
programme.desc: Bill Oddie, Jennie Bond, Anne Diamond and Pete Waterman cross Scotland from the west coast to the east on its oldest canal, the Forth and Clyde. On their way, they learn about the role Clydesdale horses played on the waterway and find out how pleasure boats began to use the canal in the late-1800s, transporting people out of the city to the countryside on day trips(n)

programme.title: When... Goes Horribly Wrong
programme.desc: Gloria Hunniford narrates a compilation of talk show disasters. The programme features Eamonn Holmes' infamous interview with a monosyllabic David Blaine, Spike Milligan causing mayhem on Wogan, Joan Rivers launching into a rant at guest Brigitte Nielsen, and Katrina Buchanan enduring a succession of technical issues while appearing on a live Irish chat show(n)

programme.title: The Comancheros (1961)
programme.desc: A hard-bitten Texas Ranger joins forces with a convict and a gambler in a covert operation to run a gang of gunmen out of the territory for supplying Comanche warriors with arms and alcohol from a secret hideout in Mexico. But after infiltrating the renegades' secret camp, they have to figure out how to survive until help arrives. Western, with John Wayne, Stuart Whitman, Ina Balin, Nehemiah Persoff and Lee Marvin(n)

programme.title: The Last Wagon (1956)
programme.desc: A mixed-race renegade is convicted for the murder of his wife's killers and transported to prison in a wagon train. When the party is attacked by Apaches, the only survivors are the prisoner and a group of orphaned children, so he takes responsibility for leading them to safety. Western, with Richard Widmark, Felicia Farr, Ray Stricklyn and Susan Kohner(n)

programme.title: The Naked Truth (1957)
programme.desc: Celebrities threatened with blackmail decide they would rather murder the extortionist than pay him, but things do not go according to plan. Comedy, starring Terry-Thomas, Peter Sellers, Dennis Price, Peggy Mount, Shirley Eaton and Joan Sims(n)

programme.title: The Riddle of the Sands (1979)
programme.desc: An English yachtsman sailing round the coast of Germany in 1901 encounters a naval officer who has betrayed his country. Enlisting the aid of a friend, he discovers a plan by Kaiser Wilhelm to invade Britain - which they are the only ones in a position to stop. Spy thriller, starring Simon MacCorkindale, Michael York and Jenny Agutter(n)

programme.title: Daddy's Home (2015)
programme.desc: A mild-mannered man hopes for his wife's two children to view him as their father. His dreams of perfect family life are threatened by the return of their biological father, a charismatic, motorcycle-riding tough guy, and he pulls out all the stops to prove to his stepchildren that he can be just as cool. Comedy, starring Will Ferrell and Mark Wahlberg(n)

programme.title: Daddy's Home 2 (2017)
programme.desc: Having settled their differences, Brad and Dusty's newfound friendship is put to the test when their respective fathers - one gentle, the other overly macho - arrive for the Christmas holidays, forcing them to change their plans. What starts as a break at a fun-filled trip to a luxury resort turns into something far more chaotic. Comedy, starring Will Ferrell, Mark Wahlberg, Mel Gibson and John Lithgow(n)

programme.title: 120 BPM (2017)
programme.desc: Members of an advocacy group demand action by the government and pharmaceutical companies to combat the AIDS epidemic in the early 1990s. Drama, starring Nahuel Perez Biscayart and Arnaud Valois. In French(n)

programme.title: The Garden (1990)
programme.desc: Derek Jarman's largely wordless drama following a young gay couple whose fate echoes the Passion of Christ, intercut with scenes of a beachcombing woman and her infant son, who resemble the Madonna and the Christ Child. Starring Kevin Collins, Johnny Mills and Tilda Swinton(n)

programme.title: Hell Is for Heroes (1962)
programme.desc: A rebellious soldier defies orders to lead two men on a secret attack on a German pillbox, but his mission fails and the other two soldiers are killed. Court-martialled for his actions, he remains convinced his plan was sound and ignores the sentence to make a second attempt at destroying the emplacement. Second World War adventure, with Steve McQueen, James Coburn and Bobby Darin(n)

programme.title: This Happy Breed (1944)
programme.desc: A working-class family moves into a new suburban home after the father returns from service in the First World War. However, the couple and their children struggle to adjust to life higher up the social ladder. David Lean's drama, adapted by Noel Coward from his play, starring Robert Newton, Celia Johnson, Robert Stanley Holloway and John Mills(n)

programme.title: The Way to the Stars (1945)
programme.desc: A naive young pilot is assigned to a British bomber base during the Second World War, and is involved in the opening skirmishes of the Battle of Britain. He encounters the first wave of American recruits to the Allies, and falls for a local girl - but when his squadron leader is killed leaving a wife and child behind, he questions whether he can afford to marry. Drama, starring John Mills and Michael Redgrave(n)

programme.title: Death Drums Along the River (1963)
programme.desc: A British inspector is called to Africa to investigate the murder of a fellow policeman and uncovers a diamond-smuggling operation seemingly connected to an upriver hospital. Mystery, based on Edgar Wallace's novel Sanders on the River, starring Richard Todd, Marianne Koch, Albert Lieven and Walter Rilla(n)

programme.title: Congo (1995)
programme.desc: An expedition to find King Solomon's diamond mines in the jungles of the Congo disappears without trace. The tycoon behind the mission sends his assistant, a former CIA agent, to find out what became of the explorers - only to discover that the party met a grisly fate at the hands of a horde of vicious apes. Action adventure based on Michael Crichton's novel, with Dylan Walsh, Laura Linney, Tim Curry and Grant Heslov(n)

programme.title: Conan the Barbarian (2011)
programme.desc: An evil warlord kills a barbarian chieftain, whose son grows up to be a mighty warrior and seeks revenge for his father's death. He finds there is more at stake, as the tyrant is close to acquiring all the pieces of a magic mask, which will make him all-powerful. Fantasy adventure, with Jason Momoa, Stephen Lang, Ron Perlman and Rose McGowan(n)

programme.title: The Pyramid (2014)
programme.desc: A previously unexplored pyramid is discovered in the Egyptian desert, and a party of archaeologists sets out to uncover its secrets. The explorers soon find the tomb is riddled with deadly traps, but this proves the least of their worries when they realise it was built to contain dark forces that they have now unleashed. Horror, starring Ashley Hinshaw and Denis O'Hare(n)

programme.title: The Last Days on Mars (2013)
programme.desc: A party of astronauts on a mission to Mars discovers evidence that the red planet once sustained life, but soon after one of their number is killed. As further deaths occur, the explorers realise the organisms they have found may still be alive and could kill them all. Sci-fi horror, starring Liev Schreiber, Elias Koteas and Romola Garai(n)

programme.title: Last Train from Gun Hill (1959)
programme.desc: A marshal discovers the man responsible for raping and killing his wife is actually the son of an old friend, setting the scene for a showdown. Western, starring Kirk Douglas, Anthony Quinn, Brian Hutton and Carolyn Jones(n)

programme.title: D-Day the Sixth of June (1956)
programme.desc: A British colonel and an American captain board a ship heading out on a dangerous mission as part of the Normandy Landings. As the two men prepare for the battle to come, they both reminisce about their love for the same woman. Second World War drama, starring Robert Taylor, Richard Todd, Dana Wynter and Edmond O'Brien(n)

programme.title: Journey to the Center of the Earth (1959)
programme.desc: An explorer discovers a prehistoric monster-infested world deep beneath Earth's crust and faces a tough ordeal escaping the predatory attacks of the creatures as he tries to guide his team back to safety. Sci-fi adventure based on Jules Verne's novel, starring Pat Boone, James Mason, Arlene Dahl and Diane Baker(n)

programme.title: Bridge of Spies (2015)
programme.desc: A lawyer in 1950s New York is hired to represent a Soviet spy in a showcase trial designed to demonstrate the fairness of the US justice system. In the face of public condemnation, he argues against the death penalty, a stance that years later leads to his involvement in an exchange of prisoners in East Germany. Steven Spielberg's fact-based Cold War drama, starring Tom Hanks and an Oscar-winning Mark Rylance(n)

programme.title: Die Hard 2 (1990)
programme.desc: Tough cop John McClane arrives at an airport to pick up his wife, but finds himself plunged into a bloody life-or-death struggle. He must battle terrorists who have seized control of the terminal as part of a campaign to secure the release of a convicted drug baron. Action thriller sequel, starring Bruce Willis, Bonnie Bedelia, William Sadler, Franco Nero and William Atherton(n)

programme.title: Commando (1985)
programme.desc: The daughter of retired special forces officer John Matrix is kidnapped by an old comrade-in-arms, now in league with a deposed former dictator. The tyrant plans to use the girl to force Matrix into assassinating the head of the country he once ruled, but is unprepared for the lengths to which the veteran soldier will go to rescue his child. Action adventure, with Arnold Schwarzenegger and Rae Dawn Chong(n)

programme.desc: Bonnie sells the table football game to a student fraternity as part of her plan to 'baby proof' the apartment, unaware that Ben was using it as a hiding place for Emma's college tuition money. programme.desc: Mike plans a special Valentine's Day surprise for Molly in the form of a custom-made cake, but is dismayed when he discovers the handsome baker he ordered the gift from is actually her ex-boyfriend. Comedy, starring Billy Gardell and Melissa McCarthy(n)

programme.desc: With the passion of having a new girlfriend well and truly over, Mike is content to settle down for a night in front of the TV. Comedy, starring Billy Gardell and Melissa McCarthy(n)

programme.desc: Leonard, Penny and Raj settle into their new living arrangement, but Penny and Raj get along so well together that Leonard starts to feel left out. Sheldon expresses an interest in Amy's work and they begin to collaborate on a scientific project(n)

programme.desc: Adam works on a new persona that he hopes will make him seem cool on his first day at high school. Beverly gets her teaching certificate and aims to work as a substitute teacher at her children's school, but things go awry and the kids end up in a Saturday detention. But after Murray pays a visit to the school, everyone learns an important lesson. Tim Meadows and Allie Grant guest star(n)

programme.desc: Erica and Lainey try to set Lainey's father Bill up with a 'woman of interest' by using new video dating technology. Santiago tries to encourage her colleagues to take a Christmas photo, only to be met with a lack of enthusiasm - and Diaz's refusal to smile. US cop comedy, starring Andy Samberg(n)

programme.desc: Peralta tries to make a deal with a suspect Diaz has just arrested in an attempt to catch a car thief he has been tracking for years. programme.desc: Sheldon's mother comes to visit and woos the gang, but he cannot help feeling jealous of all the attention she is receiving - until a bout of illness lays him low, and he suddenly sees the benefits of having her around. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons(n)

programme.desc: Leonard has doubts about his feelings for Priya when he kisses a girl he meets in the comic-book store, while the rest of the friends play pranks on Sheldon in celebration of Halloween. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta suspects a civic leader of money laundering, but his investigation is shut down by the police commissioner. programme.title: Grand Designs: The Street
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud follows Paul, Blanka and their two children, who are building the cheapest, most sustainable home on the Bicester street. To keep costs down they are using natural, chemical-free materials, and human rights lawyer Paul has put his career on hold to do much of the work himself. However, the project ends up costing the family more than they bargained for, and not just financially(n)

programme.title: Phil Spencer's Stately Homes
programme.desc: The property expert visits Hampton Court Palace just outside London, most famous as King Henry VIII's home. After 500 years of royal rebuilding, is is now a fusion of styles(n)

programme.title: New Amsterdam
programme.desc: Sharpe works on a creative way to help Max, Reynolds takes a big step in his relationship with Evie and one of the doctors makes a life-changing decision(n)

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: With more than 88,000 under-18s arrested in 2016 in the UK, this edition focuses on how Wiltshire police are dealing with an increase in young people challenging their authority. Are young people being given too many chances or not enough?(n)

programme.title: Phil Spencer's Stately Homes
programme.desc: The property expert visits Hampton Court Palace just outside London, most famous as King Henry VIII's home. After 500 years of royal rebuilding, is is now a fusion of styles(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Single father Gary, 47, is put in a medically induced coma at King's College Hospital to reduce the risk of brain damage following a serious motorcycle accident, and 69-year-old Steve confronts his fear of needles when a nurse has to remove a fishbone stuck in his finger. Meanwhile, 58-year-old lung cancer patient Terry is in A&E with his carer Sandy, a year after being given two weeks to live(n)

programme.title: New Amsterdam
programme.desc: Sharpe works on a creative way to help Max, Reynolds takes a big step in his relationship with Evie and one of the doctors makes a life-changing decision(n)

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Kate Quilton heads to California to investigate alternative dairy products at one of California's leading producers of almond milk, before meeting a scientist who has been raising genetically engineered goats whose milk he hopes might one day save half a million lives every year. Jimmy Doherty teams up with a fish detective on a covert mission buying and testing fish in Edinburgh to make sure it is the real deal, while Matt Tebbutt finds out what goes into spreadable butter(n)

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Matt Tebbutt aims to solve the age-old mystery of how to smoothly extract ketchup from a bottle - by running across a pond of custard(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Danni Menzies searches for the dream holiday home in Florida for Annette and Ian from Devon. The couple, who met when they were both teaching in the Royal Navy, have recently retired, and with their family all grown up, they're ready to enjoy extended breaks along the Gulf Coast, where they can pursue their love of the water. Danni shows them five properties for their budget of £270,000(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Bill and Lorraine are selling up in Manchester to embark on a new adventure and retirement in the central region of Andalusia in Spain. Jasmine Harman tries to assist them in finding a suitable property priced within their £130,000 budget(n)

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: Cameras capture the work of some of Britain's busiest air ambulance teams as they race to save lives. The helicopter medics cut short an appearance at a charity event in Suffolk to treat a dirtbiker who's crashed at speed. Sammy has a cardiac arrest while working at a windfarm, and Stephen breaks his thigh while off-road motorbiking in the Pennines(n)

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: In Coventry, paramedics respond to a well-known drunk nuisance caller, while in the West Midlands, a man suffering a severe diabetic attack proves combative(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Tim battles to get a fence built for their marauding flock of 25 sheep, and Krys battles to balance the books. They race to get their chateau ready for their first paying guests as Lee struggles with a chandelier. Elaine and David continue the search for their dream property, visiting a 17th-century ex-priory in Normandy and taking on board all that Dick has taught them(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Robert Fox and his partner Kevin, who run Cherry Tree House in Blackpool, hope to be in with a chance of winning the title of best B&B as another round of the competition gets under way. However, two guests are shocked at the room prices, and an afternoon learning clown skills sees a North-South divide develop in the group(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Andy and Caroline Middleton host at the Old Hall Inn in North Yorkshire, where a couple of guests are unimpressed by a discovery in their bathroom, and the afternoon's angling activity leaves two more frustrated when they fail to catch a fish(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit is to George and Juliet Bristow's Pilot Boat Inn on the Isle of Wight, where some of the guests are amazed by the building - yet others are shocked to find cobwebs in their bedrooms. Also, the hosts' constant hovering at breakfast makes the diners feel uncomfortable(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Lucy Roe welcomes her guests to Rutland Terrace in Stamford, Lincolnshire, and although they are delighted with the elegant decor, George and Juliet are unimpressed by their lack of en-suite facilities. Kevin and Robert are horrified by the state of their mattress, before being accused of attention seeking at dinner(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to discover how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers and to air their grievances, before the winner is announced(n)

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Young meerkat parents Huskie and Beagle have a new baby, Junior, but keepers have to step in when he falls gravely ill. Meanwhile, red panda Nima, who lost her partner last year, meets a new mate, Koda, but the pair do not get off to the best start, and in the penguin pool, a new male called Flounder arrives(n)

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Presenter Tim Shaw and mechanic Fuzz Townshend take on a 1934 Singer Le Mans two-seater sports car owned by 70-year-old farmer John from Cambridgeshire. The car's last outing was in 1998, when it had a starring role in a glorious wedding. The boys have to retrieve the car from a dusty barn, but once they have it back at the workshop, they discover the engine is in a very poor state and find they may have to replace it(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Belinda travels to Dick and Angel's chateau so that Angel can teach her the art of decoupage on a classic 1950s family dressing table. It's changeover day at Krys and Tim's chateau, as they sweat it out in 42-degree heat to get their 20-room chateau ready for their next booking. Budding chateau owners Elaine and David visit a 19th-century chateau with 18 rooms and two gîtes in Normandy(n)

programme.title: Grand Designs: The Street
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud follows two more plots on the epic five-year self-build in Oxfordshire. Twenty-five-year-olds Chris and Roxie take a risk building their first home together using an untested flatpack construction system. Meanwhile, Peter and Anita and their two teenagers have outgrown their current house and are keen to upsize. Father and son hope to bond while building a family home with space for all - but the process is not all plain sailing(n)

programme.title: Just One Look
programme.desc: Eva does everything she can to preserve her children's safety, but her daily life is infiltrated in frightening ways as she is under surveillance by the police as well as other interested parties. Eric tries to terrify her into giving up the search for Bastien, who is mustering all his energy and ingenuity in an attempt to escape. However, Gregory and Eva - as well as the police - search for Crystal to find out what she knows. In French(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Scaffolder Thomas arrives at London's King's College Hospital after suffering a head injury at a building site and doctors are concerned he may have fractured his skull, back or neck. Hilton, 85, has diabetes and is worried about his swollen legs, and retired architect Edgar is struggling to breathe following an asthma attack. Meanwhile, in the waiting room, two women make friends and swap stories and jokes(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: The staff of King's College Hospital reflect on the different ways in which people deal with physical and emotional pain as they treat a new batch of patients. Ahmed, 28, dislocated his shoulder during a game of American football and grits his teeth as a doctor slots it back into place. Meanwhile, 24-year-old Lee is living with Behcet's disease, a condition that affects his nervous system and causes pain so severe he passes out, and father-of-four Simon, 30, has been found unconscious at the bottom of a stairwell and it emerges he hasn't eaten for days following a relationship break-up(n)

programme.title: Nazi Hunters

programme.title: True Evil: The Making of a Nazi

programme.title: Underground Worlds
programme.desc: Incredible feats of human endeavour, revealing what people have built, where they've built it, how and why. The first edition explores deep inside the rock on Gibraltar where there's over 55km complex of tunnels, under London, where 21st-century engineering innovation is paving the way for the ultimate super sewer and continues the legacy of Victorian pioneers and reveals the extraordinary subterranean space of one of Europe's largest and most breath-taking natural cave systems - The Postojna Cave in Slovenia(n)

programme.title: Impossible Railways
programme.desc: The wilderness lines that have pushed the frontiers of human endeavour into previously unknown territories, solving a set of complex problems along the way(n)

programme.title: The Railway: First Great Western
programme.desc: As the deadline approaches for the reopening of the mainline at Dawlish, a 300-strong army of engineers works 24 hours a day to keep to the timetable. At London's Paddington station, a train with a Pullman silver service dining car is being prepared, with the onboard team pulling out all the stops to impress food writer Regula Ysewijn, who is researching an article. Elsewhere, North Cotswolds station manager Theresa - known as the 'smiling tiger' for the way she runs her stations firmly and with great care and dedication - keeps a watchful eye on the line between Oxford and Hereford, which carries the highest proportion of first-class ticket holders on the network(n)

programme.title: Train Truckers

programme.title: Underground Worlds
programme.desc: A look at Sweden's passion for subterranean spaces and how this nation has taken extraordinary precautions to protect itself - by excavating an astounding 65,000 nuclear bunkers. In south-west England, deep in the Mendip Hills of Somerset, lies one of the most spectacular landscapes in the UK, but beneath this breath-taking landscape sits secret caverns and magical rock formations carved out by nature. Plus, how in Romania, nside a 1.2km-thick layer of salt, sits a world underground first(n)

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: New York Architect Wendy Fok travels to the remote Guizhou Valley in China to see the Beipanjiang First Bridge, the highest bridge on Earth, which boasts a 20,000 tonne steel deck. She soon discovers that trying to straddle a 565 metre gorge so deep that it's known as the 'crack in the Earth', presented huge challenges for its engineers. Plus, Andrew Steele tracks down a bridge on the thames that nobody thought could ever be built, Suzie Sheehy is in Hampshire climbing the tallest unreinforced concrete town ever built and Luke Bisby scales the Forth Bridge in Edinburgh(n)

programme.title: Salvage Hunters

programme.title: Hunting Hitler
programme.desc: The team discovers a documented Nazi presence and an underground U-Boat base in the Canary Islands, and contemplates whether Hitler may have stopped there on his way to South America(n)

programme.title: Treasure Quest: Snake Island
programme.desc: After a tragic event on their way to a Guarani village, the team secures vital information from the village elders about a special stone hidden near the 'Demon Falls'(n)

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: A look at how the world's most expensive tea is harvested and treated. Plus, how the Siekierki power plant of Warsaw, Poland, manages to heat half the city's homes(n)

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: The manufacturing documentary reveals how a classic British bike is being rebooted in India, and how radiation is used to beat art fraud(n)

programme.title: Posh Pawn
programme.desc: Lawrence examines a collection of boxing memorabilia, Claudia looks through a selection of designer handbags belonging to a former model on The Price Is Right, and James takes a Ferrari for a spin in Marbella, but finds that the owner wants £100,000 for it(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: The team rummage through the hanger of a Vulcan bomber, where Henry finds a cockpit seat to restore, and Simon attempts to turn part of a jet engine into a coffee table(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Make-up enthusiast Matthew Richmond-King competes against houseproud Kate Beesley, musician Simon Holdgate and dog-sitter Jane Bunting, as the dinner-party challenge heads to south-east Essex. programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Contestants from the West Midlands compete for the cash prize of £1,000, with Rosie and Darren, Jamie and Alison, and Sean and Helen taking turns to try to make the best impression(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Arvada, Colorado, where a husband and wife have allowed their restaurant to fall into disrepair. Randy's hoarding is out of control, while Alexa, who runs the kitchen, has a lot to learn. To make matters worse, the Old Neighbourhood is one of the filthiest eateries the fiery chef has ever seen, and only one of the biggest transformations of the series can save the business(n)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra cannot understand why Ray keeps turning down her advances - not realising that playing it cool is all part of his latest devious plan to get what he wants. Comedy, starring Ray Romano(n)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Pat asks Robert to keep her cigarette habit a secret - but he later has to come up with an excuse when Amy smells smoke on him, leading to a string of revelations for the family(n)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles suggests he and Frasier set up practice together - but after a series of disasters, they end up in need of therapy themselves. Comedy, guest starring Milo O'Shea, with Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce(n)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The family prepares to mourn a relative's death, and while Frasier and Niles organise the funeral in their usual hopeless style, Martin tries to finish a song he began writing for Frank Sinatra. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: Catching up with a couple who opened a cycle retreat in Spain. Elsewhere, there are big changes afoot for an enterprising ex-pat and his water sports business on the Mediterranean(n)

programme.desc: The chef travels to Los Angeles to help La Frite, an outdated French restaurant that is failing to make any profits. His first step is to try to reconcile the feuding family members who run the business, and so devises a plan to bring them together by using secret filming(n)

He and his girlfriend recall the attack, and how it changed both their lives(n)

programme.title: Prison
programme.desc: This edition focuses on a new prisoner-led therapy group at HMP Foston Hall to help inmates who are suffering from the effects of long-term emotional, physical or sexual abuse. programme.title: Kevin McCloud's Rough Guide to the Future
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud sends three celebrities around the world to take a light-hearted look at some of the planet's biggest issues and the technology that could offer solutions. In the final episode, Jon Richardson travels to America to learn about the latest advances in technology that claim to prolong life, and Phil Wang goes to China to explore how technology is enabling new ways for people to earn a living. Elsewhere in Japan, Alice Levine learns about the robots that are becoming as advanced as humans(n)

Gemma Collins assumes the roles of captain, alongside team-mates James 'Arg' Argent, Carol Vorderman, Ellie Taylor and Rick Edwards. As usual some self-congratulatory highs, lock-in lows and some semblances of redemption lies in store for all concerned(n)

programme.title: Hunted
programme.desc: Grandfather and ex-military intelligence officer Mervyn risks returning to the launch location, while Toni is unaware that her helper has left his phone switched on, giving HQ the chance to track their every move. And with Jess and Ella's precise location revealed, and the Hunters only five minutes away, are the couple about to be caught?(n)

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer meet the Lindleys from Ashtead, Surrey. Having built up his business empire from home, cyber security expert Bill has inadvertently taken over their detached bungalow, and retired civil servant Pippa has had enough. She dreams of moving to Kent, where they can be closer to family and the coast(n)

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: Catching up with a couple who opened a cycle retreat in Spain. Elsewhere, there are big changes afoot for an enterprising ex-pat and his water sports business on the Mediterranean(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole builds a steampunk lamp from a copper electric central heating pipe and Simon O'Brien modernises a dated Welsh dresser during visits to Whitby and Shipley in Yorkshire(n)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond

programme.desc: Kate encourages Bulldog to continue his audience-grabbing practical jokes against Frasier, who decides to exact a suitable revenge - blissfully unaware that such pranks have a nasty habit of backfiring. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and Dan Butler(n)

programme.desc: The shrink is up for a prestigious title at his wine club and offers to host the next tasting in his apartment. programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Ben Hillman shows Joanne and Dean from Hertfordshire five properties in Tenerife, but it remains to be seen which, if any, they will buy for their £150,000 budget(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It

programme.desc: Foreman treats a con artist suffering from paralysis, convinced her condition stems from drug abuse - and finds that the case forces him to confront his prejudices. Meanwhile, House quizzes Wilson's ex-wife about his romantic habits. Medical mystery drama, starring Hugh Laurie(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: The brother of a young leukaemia patient is found to be a matching bone marrow donor. However, when he becomes sick before the transplant, the team races to cure him so the procedure can go ahead. House deliberately aggravates the patient's infection to help reach a diagnosis, but both boys continue to deteriorate as time runs out. Meanwhile, Foreman makes a radical decision about his future(n)

programme.desc: Property developer Alex calls in an eviction specialist after finding that he could be arrested if he tries to oust squatters from the derelict pub he has recently purchased. programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords

programme.desc: Matt and Garry try to recover more than £6,000 owed in nursery fees in Warwickshire, while Gary and Cona head to West Sussex, chasing £11,000 owed by a businessman who has defaulted on a previous plan, and have no option but to break into the property. programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Justin and Irene report Leah missing to the police, Dean and Ziggy are struggling in their own ways to deal with their break-up, and Willow opens her heart to Alex(n)

programme.desc: The medic is flown to a top-secret location to treat a CIA employee, but resorts to unconventional methods when he is forced to make a diagnosis without any clues as to the man's medical history. Meanwhile, Foreman's judgement is called into question when he supervises the candidates considering the case of a drag racer who collapsed trackside. Hugh Laurie and Omar Epps star(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: The medic takes on the case of a facially disfigured teenager who suffers a heart attack shortly before undergoing plastic surgery, but is vexed to discover that his every move will be followed by a documentary film crew paying for the boy's treatment. programme.desc: A college student is admitted after coughing up blood during karate training and House believes she has a lung problem. Meanwhile, the medic spikes Wilson's coffee with amphetamines and Foreman officially resigns(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: A chess player complains of headaches after attacking an opponent and the team believes his aggressive personality is a symptom of an illness. However, the diagnosis is complicated when his organs begin to fail. programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: After moving abroad for work, a landlord discovers that his tenants have left him over £20,000 behind with his mortgage, and the developers of an old swimming pool in Bristol discover that they are liable for the electricity that the building's squatters have been using(n)

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Documentary about the horrors of the rental market. English teacher Muhammad is suffering from serious financial difficulty as his tenant has refused to pay rent for more than four months - and to make matters worse, the tenant has been subletting rooms in his property. In north-west London, a bedsit fire exposes a negligent landlord, while in Cheshire, Carl is shocked to hear squatters are living in his property(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Matt and Garry are in Wolverhampton, where a woman who owes £2,000 in parking fines denies knowing the debtor - despite being a relative. But when her mother also gets involved, tempers start to fray. Stewart and Iain confront a woman in Cheshire who is refusing to pay fees to a veterinary practice, claiming her dog has been misdiagnosed, while Paul and Max collect £5,000 owed by a banned company director in east London accused of mis-selling assets on the stock market(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Paul and Ben face a challenging eviction in London, where a vulnerable tenant in rent arrears has barricaded her front door, and the agents receive a tirade of abuse. Meanwhile, Brian and Del chase a debt of nearly £2,000 in Surrey, before trying to recover almost £3,000 in Northamptonshire. Finally, Steve and Ru head to Portsmouth to evict a young family for a landlord who wants her property back(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court enforcement agents Paul Bohill and Steve Pinner are in Birmingham on a potentially dangerous, full-scale eviction of a large traveller community. programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: A woman owes five months' rent, but refuses to leave unless the bailiffs arrive, while a man wanted to sell his house post-breakup, but the tenants are still there five years later. Plus, a man happily living in his garden shed(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court Enforcement Agents Paul and Steve are sent to north London to evict a young Romanian mother who owes £6,000 in unpaid rent, but when they arrive, they discover a family home that is not quite what it appears to be. Later, in south-west London, Brian accompanies Delroy as he tries to recover a £400,000 debt from a residential property, and when the pair trace the defaulter to an upmarket cafe, the man in charge lies about his identity(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

programme.desc: The bloody trail of an elusive killer leads detectives Fontana and Green to a hit-list of names all connected to the trial of jailed multiple murderer Leland Barnes. programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A quarterback is found dead with traces of anaesthetic in her blood, prompting the detectives to set about discovering who could have wanted to kill her. A team-mate becomes the prime suspect, but further digging focuses attention on her problematic relationship with an ex-fiance, who reveals she had become obsessed with cosmetic procedures. Drama, starring Gary Sinise(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac's motor racing hero dies in an explosion during an exhibition event and investigations reveal someone had tampered with his car. Unfortunately, the detectives face an ever-increasing list of suspects as they discover conflicting evidence about who could have sabotaged it. Crime drama, guest starring Antonio Sabato Jr, with Gary Sinise and Melina Kanakaredes(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The killing of a private military contractor leads Fontana and Green to the brother of a man who died because of the victim's incompetence and another who witnessed the tragedy in Iraq. programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: An armed robber is shot dead during a failed bank heist, and detectives Fontana and Green discover the manager himself was forced to assist in the crime after his daughter was taken hostage. However, Fontana's heavy-handed tactics lead to a claim of police brutality by the defence lawyer. Crime drama, starring Sam Waterston(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A reporter accused of causing the deaths of US soldiers in Iraq by revealing confidential information is shot and wounded in New York. The team discovers the gun belonged to one of the dead servicemen, and suspicion soon falls on a disgruntled colleague of the deceased(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green are called to investigate the murder of a grief counsellor who claimed he could communicate with the dead, and discover he was a conman with a host of disgruntled clients, any one of whom might have had a motive for killing him. Crime drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica investigates a murder in the world of high finance when her stockbrocker is killed. Her list of suspects appears to be endless, including the secretary who seems to have been doing all of the broker's work. Starring Angela Lansbury(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica is stunned to discover after uncovering a trail of feuding and intrigue in the Californian property business, that her niece is the logical prime suspect for the murder of a rich movie heiress in Beverly Hills. Starring Angela Lansbury(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A Holocaust survivor is murdered shortly before she is due to testify at the trial of a former SS Officer stationed at a concentration camp, forcing McCoy to consider who stood to gain the most from the old woman's death - the alleged war criminal, or a music producer promoting racist records(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A respected district attorney is found dead in Central Park - and as Briscoe and Green investigate, they discover he was actually living under an assumed identity, and had never graduated from law school. To complicate matters, further inquiries link his murder to that of a journalist 10 years previously. Guest starring Michael Bloomberg(n)

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: The agents are called in to review unorthodox training exercises after a Navy Seal candidate is killed weeks before his graduation. Meanwhile, LaSalle tries to avoid an old flame(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A gunman invades a family's home, killing the parents and leaving their daughter in a critical condition. As the team struggles to find a motive for the attack, the clues lead to a surprising revelation about Rollins, threatening her career. Crime drama, starring Kelli Giddish(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Los Angeles
programme.desc: After a high-speed chase, Morales and Jaruszalski investigate the murder of a city worker found dead in the vehicle - but there is no sign of the driver(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Los Angeles

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The facially scarred daughter of Lieutenant Van Buren's college friend is found dead, putting Fontana and Green on the trail of the assailant who had thrown acid in the victim's face months earlier. Meanwhile, ADA McCoy's prosecution is complicated by Van Buren's desperation(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Stella is convinced that a woman's apparent suicide is a cover-up for murder, ending a three-year quest to trace her missing twin brother. The detective hurries to compile enough evidence to prove her instincts right and is nearly killed by the victim's stepfather - but with the culprit in custody, she hopes to find out more about the long-lost sibling. Crime drama, starring Melina Kanakaredes and Robert Joy(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A prisoner requests Hawkes' presence at his execution, and makes a confession that shocks the forensic scientist. However, just as the lethal injection is about to be administered, a guard drops dead - and a riot ensues that brings Hawkes face to face with one of his old enemies. Guest starring Harold Perrineau (Lost, Oz) and Edward Furlong (Terminator 2, American History X)(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Fontana and Green investigate the death of a teenager who committed suicide after opening fire on a doctor. Inquiries reveal the boy's sister had recently died of an Aids-related illness - and suggest he may have been seeking revenge on the man responsible for giving her an experimental drug that had not been approved for general use(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: An undercover policewoman is murdered, and the team is charged with finding out how her cover was blown. Following a series of revelations, the investigation leads to a worker in a prominent congressman's office - but the suspect has a seemingly watertight alibi. Legal drama, starring Sam Waterston, Dennis Farina and Jesse L Martin(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A sweatshop boss is killed in what initially appears to be a violent but fairly routine crime prompted by a workplace affair. Briscoe and Green begin their investigation by working on the assumption that they are looking for a wronged partner with a grievance - but inquiries gradually lead them to an illegal immigrant who claims the dead man had coerced his partner into acting as a surrogate mother(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy and Southerlyn arrest a homeless man on suspicion of killing a fellow vagrant and gather enough evidence to bring a prosecution - but a clever defence attorney tries to get him exonerated by arguing that the laws of decent society do not apply to people who live on the streets(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica reunites the suspects of a 25-year-old murder case to try to put an end to the mystery once and for all - but the exercise leads to more grim consequences. Crime drama, starring Angela Lansbury, with Donald O'Connor and Anne Francis(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Maggie McCauley, Jessica's former student and now the producer of a TV police show, gets involved in a heated argument with the network programmer who is planning to cancel the series. When her colleague is found dead in suspicious circumstances, Maggie draws upon the deductive skills gleaned from her mentor to repel the accusations against her and find the real killer(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green attend the scene of a double homicide at an exclusive restaurant. It transpires that one of the victims was a respected Hollywood producer - and had made enemies in the criminal underworld after filming a movie about the Mafia. Starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A bar-room brawl results in a baseball player being killed, leading Briscoe and Green to suspect a sporting grudge is behind the killing. However, a very different vendetta comes to light as the evidence points to a man recently exonerated after serving 20 years in prison for murder. Crime drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin(n)

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: A sailor from Mississippi, who also happens to be a biker, is murdered. When the agents investigate, they begin to suspect the death might be the result of a resurgent rivalry between two biker gangs, and Percy goes undercover to locate an old informant and find out more. Meanwhile, Gregorio suggests LaSalle have a heart-to-heart with Pride(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A computer genius is accused of murdering his girlfriend, but responds to the team's investigation by threatening to expose their darkest secrets(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Best friends Perry Gilbert and Mia Harris sneak into the woods with Mia's young sister Zoe in tow. Their search for the mythical Glasgowman leads to a series of violent events, leaving Zoe gravely injured and the other girls missing. Detectives Rollins and Carisi work to locate the suspect, while Benson digs through the stories to distinguish fantasy from reality. Crime drama, starring Mariska Hargitay, Kelli Giddish and Peter Scanavino(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The SVU detectives team up with their counterparts in the Chicago Intelligence Unit to take down a child pornography ring. Crime drama, starring Mariska Hargitay and Ice-T(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A child prostitute is reported missing, leading Benson and Haden to discover that several other women have also disappeared after placing ads on the same website - and their relationship is put to the test as they race to find the girl. Crime drama, guest starring Harry Connick Jr, with Mariska Hargitay(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson's estranged half-brother shows up in New York asking for her help because Child Services is threatening to take his children away from him. When she asks defence attorney Bayard Ellis to represent her sibling, a seemingly straightforward case turns into a disaster. Elsewhere, a homeless couple find an abandoned baby. Crime drama, starring Mariska Hargitay(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Los Angeles
programme.desc: DNA provides the team a suspect in a bank robbery - Stanley Vaughn, who served two years for involuntary manslaughter. While DA Hardin pushes Dekker to use California's 'three strikes' law to put Vaughn away permanently, the suspect's junk-strewn apartment offers up little concrete evidence and the two fall out over the best way to proceed. However, the garden contains something explosive, suggesting that Vaughn has bigger plans on the horizon. Crime drama, starring Terrence Howard and Peter Coyote(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Los Angeles
programme.desc: TJ and Morales pursue leads in connection with the murder of a student whose body was found dumped in a park. Crime drama, starring Corey Stoll and Alfred Molina(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A man is mysteriously killed after desecrating a treasured edition of the Hebrew Torah, brought from Poland to America. Detectives follow the trail to a man who confesses to the murder, but explains that his cousin paid the victim to defile the book. As ADA McCoy probes the family feud, he learns it may be linked to a lucrative property sale. Crime drama, with Sam Waterston, Allan Miller, Zach Grenier and Mark Feuerstein(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac witnesses a suspicious exchange of briefcases from his window while recuperating from an injury at home, and the strange goings-on lead to murder. The investigation unexpectedly puts him back in touch with ex-girlfriend Peyton Driscoll. An episode paying homage to Alfred Hitchcock's film Rear Window, starring Gary Sinise, with Claire Forlani(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A murderer wages a cyber war on healthcare workers he holds a grudge against. Calling himself Grave Digger, the killer enmeshes Mac in his scheme, claiming there is a bond between them - but the team has an opportunity to foil his plan when he unwittingly reveals the identity of his next target. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise and Anna Belknap, with Greg Germann (Ally McBeal)(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Detective Falco spends an evening on the town and goes home with a woman he meets in a bar. Unfortunately, when he wakes up the next morning, he does not just have a hangover to contend with - his conquest has been stabbed to death in the bathroom, and he is the main suspect. Starring Michael Imperioli, Jesse L Martin and Dennis Farina(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A cop is murdered during a botched robbery, triggering an investigation that leads Green and Cassady to a paparazzo who may have compromising photos of a celebrity and her baby. programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the murder of a bookmaker whose testimony led to the incarceration of a Mob boss 10 years previously. programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the case of a motivational speaker who died after being pushed from a hotel balcony, and find themselves caught up in a protest against gay adoption laws. Crime drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica comes to the aid of old friend and New York police officer James O'Malley, who is investigating a suicide he believes was actually a murder. Starring Angela Lansbury(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A former jewel thief and Jessica's friend Dennis Stanton spends a romantic evening with a woman, only to find himself the prime suspect in a puzzling murder. A coin collector is found dead and the sleuth must try to prevent an injustice being done. Keith Michell guest stars, with Angela Lansbury and Dina Merrill(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A Japanese businessman survives a shooting incident in which his wife was killed, and later claims they were attacked by a black gunman. However, Briscoe and Green begin to suspect he is attempting to stir up racial prejudice in a bid to conceal the fact they were actually targeted by yakuza mobsters from his native country. Crime drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The suspicious death of a rich Iranian caviar importer the day after his wedding leads the detectives to a string of suspects, including his wife and his chief competitor in the industry.
